action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 14 eval failed with a state_dict size mismatch when loading ensemble checkpoints. The traceback shows an old checkpoint has interaction_embed shape [299,256] while current model expects [298,256]. This suggests leftover incompatible models in the ensemble/ directory. I need to inspect all checkpoints, identify which are loadable, and either clean the directory or switch to a compatible checkpoint. I also want to verify best_model.pt compatibility. Analysis: Before any further training or eval submission, I must know exactly which checkpoints match the current code. The mismatch is likely from an earlier iteration that reserved an extra embedding index (e.g., padding_idx). Decision: Write and run a quick diagnostic script that attempts to load every checkpoint with the current model.py and prints the result. Then I'll clean up or fix predict.py accordingly.
